title: Hearth and Harvest
description: Hearth and Harvest is an addon for the popular food mod, Farmer's Delight
body:
**Hearth and Harvest** is a mod that expands upon the cooking system from **Farmer's Delight.**

It introduces more food into the game, as well as storage blocks, decorations, and functional blocks

📖 **Getting Started:**

The mod currently adds 5 new crops, all of which can be obtained from farmer villagers or wandering traders

Blueberry and Raspberry bushes can be found throughout the world

Wild grape plants can be found to get started on your vineyards

A tree tapper can be made and placed on Spruce and Dark Oak trees to begin collecting sap, which can later be cooked into syrup in a heated cauldron

Salt can be collected by cooking water bottles or buckets in a cooking pot

🎮 **Discord:**

Discord: [https://discord.gg/zWfH77sXKz](https://discord.gg/zWfH77sXKz)

📝 **Credits:**

Developed by AlabasterLeking

Thanks to vectorwing for creating Farmer's Delight [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight)  
  
Thank you to the team behind Brewin' and Chewin' of which the mod takes inspiration and also utilizes some code, art, and mechanics [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewin-and-chewin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewin-and-chewin)
